title: Silky Sweet Spanish Rice Pilaf
description: A quick, pressurecooked ketofriendly rice pilaf with Arabic shortgrain rice, aromatic spices, and a touch of sweetness for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Saffron threads (soaked in 1 tablespoon hot water)

instructions: Set the electric pressure cooker to the sauté setting and add the olive oil and butter; let them melt.
Add the diced onion and carrot, sautéing for 3–4 minutes until softened.
Stir in the ground cinnamon, cumin, saffron (with its soaking water), and monk‑fruit sweetener; cook for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Add the rice, stirring to coat it in the fragrant oil mixture for 1 minute.
Pour in the broth, season with salt and pepper, and stir.
Close the lid, set the valve to seal, and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes.
When the cycle ends, perform a quick pressure release by carefully turning the valve to vent.
Open the lid, fluff the rice with a fork, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a sprinkle of fresh parsley or a squeeze of lemon juice for brightness.
